allow:
Bash(cd "C:/workspace_eclipse/BeautyEye" && \\
mkdir -p build/classes && \\
find src -name "*.java" > sources.txt && \\
javac -encoding UTF-8 \\
  -source 8 -target 8 \\
  -cp "library/ninepatch4j.jar" \\
  -d build/classes \\
  @sources.txt 2>&1)

Bash(cd "C:/workspace_eclipse/BeautyEye" && \\
jar cf beautyeye-3.6-java17.jar -C build/classes . 2>&1 && \\
echo "JAR 打包成功" && \\
jar tf beautyeye-3.6-java17.jar | grep -E "\\.\(class|png|properties\)$" | wc -l)
Bash(cd "C:/workspace_eclipse/BeautyEye" && jar cf beautyeye-3.6-java17.jar -C build/classes . && echo "success")
